name: agent-step-toolkit
description: Build agent-step LangGraph projects and tools — bootstrap a new project (runner library + streaming CLI + scaffold + the required local sandbox service), add domain tools (actions / executors / verifiers / controller hooks + invalidatesOnChange) with sandbox extensions per backend, add channel-handoff actions with orchestrator/specialized agent roles and COMPLETED/ABANDON/OFF_TOPIC handbacks (the bootstrap scaffold ships the channel middleware wire/streaming contract), port an existing project onto agent-step, and apply the three-layer test methodology (runner unit / sandbox / prompt-input).
